COMPANIES ACT (PUBLIC COMPANIES - ANNUAL
GENERAL MEETINGS)

[ L.S. 386.23

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 386.23
REGOLAMENTI DWAR COMPANIES ACT (PUBLIC
COMPANIES - ANNUAL GENERAL MEETINGS) *
10 ta’ Lulju, 2020
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 288 tal-2020.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

*Dawn ir-Regolamenti ġew imħassrin bl-Avviż Legali 41 tal-2023.

1
